PLEASE RE-CALENDAR THE MOTION IN DEPARTMENT 206 BEFORE PRESIDING JUDGE LEE. THE MOVANT SEEKS TO VACATE THE ORDER ENTERED MAY 15, 2014 THAT JUDGE LEE ISSUED. NTC OF MTN REQUESTING SETTING OF TRIAL DATE AND MEMO OF P&A ISO MTN REQUESTING SETTING OF TRIAL DATE, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY PLAINTIFF GIBSON, ATOYA HEARING SET FOR MAY-13-2014 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 206

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON MAY-13-2014 IN 206, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION REQUESTING SETTING OF TRIAL DATE. SUSAN KANG GORDON APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. NO OPPOSITION FILED. AFTER FINDING GOOD CAUSE, THE COURT GRANTS PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO SET A TRIAL DATE. THE TRIAL DATE IS SET FOR 12/1/14 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. THE COURT GRANTS PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES AND ORDERED SANCTIONS ON DEFENDANT IN THE AMOUNT OF $2,475.00 PAYABLE TO PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY DUE IN 10 DAYS FOR PLAINTIFF'S PREPARATION AND APPEARANCE FOR VARIOUS OSC, EFFORTS TO OBTAIN A TRIAL DATE AND FOR EFFORTS TO HAVE THE DEFENSE BRING THE CROSS-COMPLAINT AT ISSUE. ALL PRE-TRIAL DEADLINES SHALL TRACK THE TRIAL DATE. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
